ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the region */,
  "economic_zone" TEXT /* Economic zone (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 0-15, 16-19) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population size for the age group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution (e.g., 50% male, 50% female) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_groups_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Average household size */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in households */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income per household */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., apartment, single-family home) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_emissions" (
  "gas_emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas emission record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "gas_type" TEXT /* Type of greenhouse gas (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  "emission_level" REAL /* Emission level (in tons) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of emissions (e.g., industrial, transportation, residential) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_emissions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "gdp_value" REAL /* GDP value (in millions) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of GDP data */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate (percentage) */,
  "sectoral_contribution" TEXT /* Sectoral contribution (e.g., agriculture, manufacturing, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "temperature_value" REAL /* Temperature value (in Celsius) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of temperature data */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "monthly_average_temperature" REAL /* Monthly average temperature (in Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "one" (
  "one_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each one-person household record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "one_value" REAL /* Number of one-person households */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of one-person households in the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("one_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_one_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "children_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each children record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "children_value" REAL /* Number of children */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of children in the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("children_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
